$metadata.tokens_format: Figma Tokens Studio compatible (import via Tokens Studio plugin)
$metadata.usage: Import into Figma via Tokens Studio plugin. Apply $themes at page level: 'Operate' for dark operational frames (PM1-PM3 work surfaces), 'Prove' for light exec/compliance surfaces (F21, F42, F45).

operate.description: Midnight graphite — dark operational canvas. Primary background for all work surfaces PM1-PM3.

base.description: Base surface — cards, lists, panels in operate mode.

raised.description: Raised surface — elevated cards, dropdowns, popovers.

overlay.description: Overlay — modals, hover states on raised surfaces.

prove.description: Prove mode canvas — ivory, boardroom-safe, printable.

prove_card.description: Prove mode card — white, used for ROI cards, compliance evidence cards.

primary_on_dark.description: Primary text on operate canvas. Body, headings, values.

500.description: PRIMARY brand color — main CTAs (Approve, Generate, Save), value indicators, approval flows, ROI tiles, positive momentum. Tailwind 'primary' slot maps to this.

400.description: Lighter teal — hover states on primary actions.

600.description: Darker teal — pressed states on primary actions.

500.description: SECONDARY brand color — RESERVED for AI / intelligence actions ONLY (agent outputs, AI labels, Confidence Lane, AI-draft badges). Never use for non-AI CTAs. Tailwind 'secondary' slot maps to this.

400.description: Lighter violet — hover states on secondary (AI) actions.

600.description: Darker violet — pressed states on secondary (AI) actions.

pass.description: Green — test pass, defect resolved, healthy trend.

pass_bg.description: Green background — pass pills, success toasts.

fail.description: Red — test fail, P0 defect, breaking change.

fail_bg.description: Red background — fail pills, error toasts.

warn.description: Amber — flaky, at-risk, degraded AI confidence.

500.description: Dedicated AI accent (violet-400) — lighter violet used for AI-generated content highlights, Confidence Lane glow, AI text labels. Distinct from Secondary brand violet #A78BFA which is for AI CTA chips / badges. Used when a softer AI visual is needed (background tints, subtle highlights).
Neutral gray — disabled states, deeply-secondary labels, subtle metadata. Sits between secondary text (#C7D0DC) and tertiary text (#8A94A6).

canvas.description: PROVE mode main canvas — ivory, boardroom-safe, printable.

base.description: PROVE mode base surface — white cards, ROI tiles, compliance cards.

raised.description: PROVE mode raised surface — subtle off-white for card hover / elevated content.

overlay.description: PROVE mode overlay — modal backgrounds in prove mode.

pass.description: PROVE mode green — darker for WCAG AA contrast on white.

fail.description: PROVE mode red — darker for light-mode contrast.

warn.description: PROVE mode amber — darker bronze for light-mode readability.

info.description: PROVE mode blue — darker for light-mode.

ai.description: PROVE mode AI accent — darker violet for AI content on white. Used sparingly.

neutral.description: PROVE mode neutral gray — secondary text, metadata on light canvas.

high.description: Confidence ≥0.85 — left-edge marker on AI suggestion cards.

subtle_on_dark.description: Subtle border for card separation on dark canvas.

strong_on_dark.description: Stronger border — focus rings, active states.

ui.description: UI font — body, labels, cards, tables.

display.description: Display — page question headers, section titles, hero metrics.

metric.description: Metrics — KPIs, IDs, counts, percentages on cards.

question_header.description: Page question — top of every main frame.

question_answer.description: One-line answer summary under page question.

card_metric_primary.description: Primary number on outcome board cards.

body.description: Body text — most list rows, paragraphs.

body_dense.description: Dense mode body — tables, long lists.

label.description: Field labels, column headers, section labels.

code.description: Code blocks, selectors, diff lines, policy rules.

prove_display.description: Prove-mode executive hero number (ROI tile, revenue protected tile).

6.description: lg — between major sections on a frame.

8.description: xl — between Outcome Board rows and content below.

16.description: top band height for question header.

1.description: Subtle lift — cards on raised surface.

medium.description: Panel slide-in, sheet open, card reveal.

reduced_motion.value: Respect prefers-reduced-motion — disable slide/fade, retain state change.

ring.description: Focus ring — always visible on keyboard focus, high-contrast.

min_contrast_body.description: Text on canvas — minimum. All typography/color pairs in this file meet or exceed.

min_tap_target.description: Minimum tap/click target for interactive elements on mobile companion.

color_not_only.description: Every status uses color + icon/shape + text. Never color alone.

$themes.name: Operate
$themes.description: Dark operational mode — PM1 test authoring, PM2 self-healing, PM3 low-code. Default.

$themes.name: Prove
$themes.description: Light prove mode — F21 Exec Dashboard, F42 Compliance Vault, F45 Global Portfolio Board. Printable, boardroom-safe.

$themes.name: Review
$themes.description: Review mode uses Operate canvas with denser spacing and added Confidence Lane and Evidence Thread motifs. Tokens are same as Operate — mode toggle is a density + emphasis change, not a color swap.
